Privacy

Privacy Policy

Your story is safe with us. Here's exactly how we protect it.

Last updated December 20, 2024 7 min read
On this page
Our Promise What We Remember How We Use It Keeping It Safe Who Sees What Your Control Special Cases Questions
Your data is protected
Encrypted end-to-end
Human-first approach

Our Promise

We remember your story because that's how we help you grow. Not to sell it. Not to share it. To be there for you in a way no one else can.

The Ferni difference:

We're not like social media or search engines that make money from your data. Our business model is simple—you pay for our service, and we use your information only to make that service better for you.

What We Remember

To be the coach who actually knows you, we keep track of:

Your Conversations

Everything you share with Ferni and our team of specialists. This is the heart of what makes us useful—we remember what you're working on, what you've overcome, and what matters to you.

Your Account

Basic information like your email or phone number—only what you choose to share when you sign up or call us.

How You Use Ferni

Things like when you talk to us, which team members you connect with, and what features you use. This helps us understand how to serve you better.

Technical Information

Your device type, browser, and general location (city level, not street address). This helps us make Ferni work smoothly on your devices.

What We Collect Why
Conversation history Personalized, continuous coaching
Email / Phone Account access, reaching you
Usage patterns Improving your experience
Device info Making Ferni work for you

How We Use It

Your information serves one purpose: helping you grow. Here's what that looks like:

  • Personalized coaching: Remembering your goals, struggles, and wins so every conversation builds on the last
  • Continuity: Picking up where we left off, whether it's been a day or a month
  • Better service: Understanding what works so we can keep improving
  • Reaching you: Sending updates about your account (only with your permission for marketing)
  • Safety: Protecting against fraud and keeping the service secure
What we'll never do:

Sell your data. Show you ads based on your conversations. Share your story with anyone who doesn't need it to help us serve you.

Keeping It Safe

Trust is earned. Here's how we protect yours:

Encryption Everywhere

Your conversations are encrypted in transit (as they travel to us) and at rest (when they're stored). Even our team can't read your conversations without specific, logged authorization.

Industry Standards

We use the same security practices trusted by banks and healthcare providers. Regular audits, access controls, and monitoring keep your data protected.

Minimal Access

Only the systems that need your data to serve you can access it. Our team operates on a strict need-to-know basis.

Continuous Improvement

Security isn't a destination—it's a practice. We regularly review and upgrade our protections as technology evolves.

Who Sees What

We work with trusted partners to make Ferni possible. They're bound by strict contracts to protect your information:

  • Cloud infrastructure: Secure servers that store and process your data
  • AI providers: The language models that power our conversations
  • Analytics: Tools that help us understand how to improve (never linked to your personal conversations)
  • Payment processors: If you're a subscriber, they handle payment securely

These partners only see what they need to do their job. They can't use your data for their own purposes, and they're held to the same standards we hold ourselves to.

When We Might Have to Share

In rare cases, we may need to share information:

  • To comply with valid legal requests
  • To protect safety (yours, ours, or others')
  • If Ferni is acquired (your privacy protections would transfer)

We'll always tell you if we're compelled to share your data, unless we're legally prohibited from doing so.

Your Control

Your data belongs to you. Here's what you can do with it:

  • Access: See what we have stored about you
  • Correct: Fix anything that's wrong
  • Export: Download your conversation history
  • Delete: Request we remove your data entirely
  • Opt out: Stop marketing emails anytime
Deleting your data:

If you ask us to delete everything, we will—but we'll lose the ability to remember your story. You'd be starting fresh. Some information may be retained for legal compliance, but it won't be used for coaching.

To exercise any of these rights, email privacy@ferni.ai. We'll respond within 30 days.

Special Cases

Children

Ferni is designed for adults. We don't knowingly collect information from anyone under 13. If you believe a child has used our service, contact us immediately.

International Users

We're based in the United States, and your data is processed here. If you're using Ferni from elsewhere, your information crosses borders—but our protections travel with it.

California Residents

You have additional rights under the CCPA, including knowing what we collect, deleting your data, and opting out of "sales" (which we don't do anyway). Same email: privacy@ferni.ai.

European Users

Under GDPR, you have rights to access, rectification, erasure, and data portability. We process your data based on legitimate interest (providing the service you've requested) and consent (for optional features).

Questions?

Privacy shouldn't be confusing. If you're wondering how something works, ask:

  • Privacy questions: privacy@ferni.ai
  • General support: hello@ferni.ai
  • Phone: 1 (484) 481-3081

This policy may change as we grow and regulations evolve. We'll update the date at the top and, for significant changes, give you a heads up. Your continued use means you accept the updates.

Last thought: We built Ferni because we believe everyone deserves someone who truly listens and remembers. That trust is the foundation of everything we do. Thank you for letting us be part of your story.

Questions? We're here.

We believe in making things simple. If anything here is unclear, just ask.
